name: Date Picker
description: Foldkit-native shadcn Date Picker wrapper built on the native @foldkit/ui DatePicker and Calendar submodels, with live single-date examples and deferred range, time, and natural-language parsing examples.

registry.reason: Date picker trigger and calendar cells preserve the local shadcn button affordances.
The visual calendar layout mirrors the local shadcn Calendar styling while using the native DatePicker model.
Origin form examples are represented through local shadcn field composition.
The ISO input example composes local input affordances.
The input example uses local Input Group helpers for the displayed ISO value.
Native DatePicker owns popover behavior and the wrapper keeps shadcn popover visual tokens.
Date Picker class helpers use the shared class canonicalization utility.

runtime.reason: Provides Calendar date helpers, Html, and Foldkit submodel rendering.
Provides the native DatePicker, Calendar, and Popover submodels.
Provides Schema, Option, Either, and pattern matching helpers.
Provided through the shared utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the shared utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Installable source uses native Foldkit DatePicker instead of React DayPicker.
Supported examples use native Foldkit Calendar formatting and ISO decoding.
Locale examples use local Calendar.LocaleConfig values.
Locale examples use local Calendar.LocaleConfig values.
Installable source uses local inline SVG icons instead of Lucide React.
The RTL example uses deterministic local locale data instead of the origin app selector.
Natural-language parsing is deferred until a native Foldkit parsing model exists.

examples.title: DatePickerDemo
examples.description: Default selected-date Date Picker with shadcn trigger and native Calendar popover.
examples.distinguishes: Default selected-date Date Picker with shadcn trigger and native Calendar popover.

examples.title: DatePickerBasic
examples.description: Compact Date Picker trigger with a deterministic selected date.
examples.distinguishes: Compact Date Picker trigger with a deterministic selected date.

examples.title: DatePickerDob
examples.description: Date of birth picker with native min and max date constraints.
examples.distinguishes: Date of birth picker with native min and max date constraints.

examples.title: DatePickerInput
examples.description: Date Picker composed with an Input Group and hidden ISO field.
examples.distinguishes: Date Picker composed with an Input Group and hidden ISO field.

examples.title: DatePickerRtl
examples.description: RTL Date Picker with local Calendar locale labels.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Date Picker with local Calendar locale labels.

deviations.summary: Date Picker has docs/example-only origin evidence because the current origin does not ship a base-nova ui/date-picker.tsx source file.
deviations.rationale: The installable Foldkit item is sourced from documented origin examples and local native primitives rather than a missing primary component file.

deviations.summary: Date Picker uses native @foldkit/ui DatePicker and Foldkit CalendarDate values instead of React DayPicker, date-fns, or React state.
deviations.rationale: Installable source must stay Foldkit-native and reuse the framework-owned date submodel.

deviations.summary: Trigger and navigation icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on React icon packages.

deviations.summary: Range, time, natural-language parsing, presets, and advanced locale examples are deferred.
deviations.rationale: Native @foldkit/ui DatePicker currently models single-date selection; advanced modes need separate Foldkit-native foundations.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn Date Picker wrapper built on the native @foldkit/ui DatePicker and Calendar submodels, with live single-date examples and deferred range, time, and natural-language parsing examples.
